headline: Is Cameco Set to Benefit From DOE-Backed Nuclear Expansion?
summary: CCJ could gain from DOE's up to $17.5B loan plan for Westinghouse-led U.S. nuclear reactor investment tied to AP1000 projects.

headline: The Portfolio That Quietly Pays For Two Cruises Every Year
summary: Most retirees treat cruise fares like an occasional splurge funded from cash on hand or a withdrawal from the portfolio. There is another way to frame the same expense: build an income stream that quietly pays for two trips every year, leaving the principal untouched. Three Budgets, Four Yields The core equation is the same ... The Portfolio That Quietly Pays For Two Cruises Every Year
